calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

AAppearances: Robert Chan, via Zoom, for and with, Henry Chan and Leanna Chan, Co-Executors.

After having been sworn-in by the clerk, the Co-Executors, via examination by their counsel, confirm that neither of them has ever been incarcerated. Counsel confirms decedent's date of death as Jan-31-2018. The court and counsel discuss the Inventory and Appraisal filed on May-18-2021 and that there is a brokerage account that was not included in the accounting petition. Counsel is advised that he will need to file an amended petition in light of the preceding.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Jun-28-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

***After hearing: Upon further consideration and with confirmation of Counsel for the co-executors, the Court takes the matter under submission.
